Description:
  Deployment tool for DotnetPackaging

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  nuget    Publish NuGet packages
  release  Create a GitHub release for an Avalonia solution

result.stdout:
Description:
  Publish NuGet packages

Usage:
  DotnetPackaging.DeployerTool nuget [options]

Options:
  --project <project>            Paths to the csproj files to publish
  --solution <solution>          Solution file for automatic project discovery. If not specified, the tool searches parent directories
  --version <version>            Package version. If omitted, GitVersion is used and falls back to git describe
  --api-key <api-key>            NuGet API key. Can be provided via NUGET_API_KEY env var []
  --name-pattern <name-pattern>  Wildcard pattern to select projects when discovering automatically. Defaults to '<solution>*'
  --no-push                      Only build packages without pushing to NuGet
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information


[16:11:04 INF ] DeployerTool Execution completed with exit code 0

commands.payload:
Description:
  Publish NuGet packages

Usage:
  DotnetPackaging.DeployerTool nuget [options]

Options:
  --project <project>            Paths to the csproj files to publish
  --solution <solution>          Solution file for automatic project discovery. If not specified, the tool searches parent directories
  --version <version>            Package version. If omitted, GitVersion is used and falls back to git describe
  --api-key <api-key>            NuGet API key. Can be provided via NUGET_API_KEY env var []
  --name-pattern <name-pattern>  Wildcard pattern to select projects when discovering automatically. Defaults to '<solution>*'
  --no-push                      Only build packages without pushing to NuGet
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a GitHub release for an Avalonia solution

Usage:
  DotnetPackaging.DeployerTool release [options]

Options:
  --solution <solution>                                        Solution file. If omitted the tool searches parent directories
  --prefix <prefix>                                            Prefix used to locate projects inside the solution
  --version <version>                                          Release version. If omitted GitVersion is used
  --package-name <package-name>                                Package name. Defaults to the solution name
  --app-id <app-id>                                            Application identifier. Defaults to the solution name
  --app-name <app-name>                                        Application name. Defaults to the solution name
  --owner <owner> (REQUIRED)
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                   GitHub token. Can be provided via GITHUB_TOKEN env var []
  --release-name <release-name>
  --tag <tag>
  --body <body>                                                []
  --draft
  --prerelease
  --platform <platform>                                        Platforms to publish: windows, linux, android, wasm [default: windows|linux|android|wasm]
  --android-keystore-base64 <android-keystore-base64>
  --android-key-alias <android-key-alias>
  --android-key-pass <android-key-pass>
  --android-store-pass <android-store-pass>
  --android-app-version <android-app-version>                  [default: 1]
  --android-app-display-version <android-app-display-version>
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information


[16:11:04 INF ] DeployerTool Execution completed with exit code 0

commands.payload:
Description:
  Create a GitHub release for an Avalonia solution

Usage:
  DotnetPackaging.DeployerTool release [options]

Options:
  --solution <solution>                                        Solution file. If omitted the tool searches parent directories
  --prefix <prefix>                                            Prefix used to locate projects inside the solution
  --version <version>                                          Release version. If omitted GitVersion is used
  --package-name <package-name>                                Package name. Defaults to the solution name
  --app-id <app-id>                                            Application identifier. Defaults to the solution name
  --app-name <app-name>                                        Application name. Defaults to the solution name
  --owner <owner> (REQUIRED)
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                   GitHub token. Can be provided via GITHUB_TOKEN env var []
  --release-name <release-name>
  --tag <tag>
  --body <body>                                                []
  --draft
  --prerelease
  --platform <platform>                                        Platforms to publish: windows, linux, android, wasm [default: windows|linux|android|wasm]
  --android-keystore-base64 <android-keystore-base64>
  --android-key-alias <android-key-alias>
  --android-key-pass <android-key-pass>
  --android-store-pass <android-store-pass>
  --android-app-version <android-app-version>                  [default: 1]
  --android-app-display-version <android-app-display-version>
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information


[16:11:04 INF ] DeployerTool Execution completed with exit code 0
